description: Convert spectral data between mzML, mzXML, and MGF, with optional MS-level and RT/intensity filtering. FileHandler auto-detects the input format.
rules: output format is chosen by OUT_NAME extension (.mzML, .mzXML, .mgf)
writes the converted file under record_store as OUT_NAME
optional filters: MS_LEVEL, RT_MIN, RT_MAX, MIN_INTENSITY
usage: Set INPUT and OUT_NAME (output filename with .mzML/.mzXML/.mgf). Optional MS_LEVEL/RT_MIN/RT_MAX/MIN_INTENSITY. Output: <OUT_NAME> + convert.log.
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates the output file and records the reason.
